title: Binary Search, Selection, and Boundary Finding · Algorithm Stakeholder Mission
summary: A records office needs fast duplicate, ordering, and threshold queries. Combine hashing, sorting, and boundary-safe search with explicit worst-case handling. Planned artifact: Deliver Collision-Resistant Record Index with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Relate hash stability, equality, and immutable key requirements.
Trace separate chaining and open addressing through collision and deletion cases.
Explain how load factor and resizing influence expected cost and memory.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
